name: AI multi-tool showcase: chat, summarize, translate, code, and extract
description: Demonstrates five AI capabilities in one flow: text chat/Q&A, content summarization, language translation, code generation, and data extraction. Runs all through Claude AI, compiles results, saves to Google Sheets, and posts a showcase to Slack.

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving results

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting showcase

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for AI showcase results

chatQuestion.default: What are the top 3 trends in AI for 2026?

textToSummarize.description: Text to summarize (leave empty for a default sample)

codeTask.default: Write a Python function that checks if a string is a palindrome

textToExtract.description: Text to extract structured data from

steps.name: Save showcase results to Google Sheets
